mapper.select: select student_no, student_name, concat(left(student_ssn,8),'******') as 'student_ssn', if(char_length(student_address) > 10, concat(left(student_address,10),'...'),student_address) as 'student_address', date_format(entrance_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as 'entrance_date', absence_yn from tb_student

select student_no, student_name, concat(left(student_ssn,8),'******') as 'student_ssn', if(student_address is not null, if(char_length(student_address) > 10, concat(left(student_address,10),'...'),student_address), ' ***주소 미상*** ') as 'student_address', date_format(entrance_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as 'entrance_date', absence_yn from tb_student where student_name like CONCAT('%', #{student_name}, '%')

select student_no, student_name, concat(left(student_ssn,8),'******') as 'student_ssn', if(student_address is not null, if(char_length(student_address) > 10, concat(left(student_address,10),'...'),student_address), ' ***주소 미상*** ') as 'student_address', date_format(entrance_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as 'entrance_date', absence_yn from tb_student where entrance_date between CONCAT(#{x}, '-01-01') and CONCAT(#{y},'-12-31') order by entrance_date desc
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_department SET capacity = capacity + ( CASE WHEN capacity BETWEEN 0 AND 20 THEN 5 WHEN capacity BETWEEN 21 AND 25 THEN 4 WHEN capacity BETWEEN 26 AND 30 THEN 3 ELSE 0 END ) WHERE capacity BETWEEN 0 AND 30
mapper.select: select term_no, student_no, student_name, class_name, point, case when point between 0 and 1.9 then 'F학점' when point between 2.0 and 2.9 then 'D학점' when point between 3.0 and 3.4 then 'C학점' when point between 3.5 and 3.9 then 'B학점' when point >= 4.0 then 'A학점' end as 'grade' from tb_student join tb_grade using(student_no) join tb_class using(class_no) where student_no = #{student_no}
